NoFeeSwap — local assignment UI

Pool init & liquidity were done via scripts. Here you connect MetaMask to Hardhat (31337) and submit swaps through the Operator unlock path.

Notes
  • Import a Hardhat test key in MetaMask; add network RPC http://127.0.0.1:8545, chain 31337.
  • Estimated output / price impact: simplified — see README transparency.
  • Kernel graph UI omitted; pool uses SwapData_test-style kernel from scripts.
